name: Shien's Advisor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>参</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>謀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned while you control a "Six Samurai" monster: Declare 1 Monster Type; while this card is face-up on the field, monsters with the declared Monster Type cannot declare an attack or be Special Summoned.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned while you control a "Six Samurai" monster: Declare 1 Monster Type; while this card is face-up on the field, monsters with the declared Monster Type cannot declare an attack or be Special Summoned.
eff: If this card is Normal Summoned while you control a "Six Samurai" monster: Declare 1 Monster Type; while this card is face-up on the field, monsters with the declared Monster Type cannot declare an attack or be Special Summoned.

attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
